## Headroom Learned Patterns
*Auto-generated by `headroom learn` on 2026-07-15 — do not edit manually*

### RTK / Forge Harness
*~4,773 tokens/session saved*
- In Forge harness sessions, use `mcp__forge__web_search` / `mcp__forge__web_fetch` for any web access; never use native/provider browsing.
- Avoid repeatedly shelling with `cd /home/floris/Documents/Repositories/Personal/AI/forge/.forge/swe-bench/...`; set the working directory once or use repo-relative paths in MCP file/search calls.

### Pylint 5859 / Verification
*~2,500 tokens/session saved*
- Do not loop on `python -m pytest tests/checkers/unittest_misc.py ... | tail ...` when it prints only `26 bytes` / no useful detail; run once without `tail` or use `--collect-only` with full output to diagnose collection/import issues.
- If pytest fails from missing Pylint test dependencies (`astroid`, `toml`, `isort`, `dill`, conftest import errors), stop installing packages one-by-one in the system Python; use a proper project test environment or verify the regex logic with a focused Python snippet and report the dependency blocker.

### Pylint 5859 / Target Files
*~1,800 tokens/session saved*
- For the punctuation-only `--notes` / W0511 bug, start with `pylint/checkers/misc.py` and `tests/checkers/unittest_misc.py`; these files were the relevant implementation and checker test targets in most sessions.
- Functional fixme fixtures, when needed, live under `tests/functional/f/fixme.py`, `.rc`, and `.txt`; avoid broad `tests/**` probing after those paths are known.

### RTK / Tool Output Guardrails
*~1,225 tokens/session saved*
- If `mcp__forge__read_file` on files under `.forge/swe-bench/pylint-dev__pylint-5859` needs more context, read the exact full file once or request the exact `start_line`/`end_line`; do not re-read nearby slices repeatedly.
- When editing `pylint/checkers/misc.py`, inspect the target hunk once and apply one precise edit; repeated edits to the same regex block caused stale/duplicated patch attempts.
- For new functional fixtures, write each of `.py`, `.rc`, and `.txt` once after checking the existing `fixme` fixture format; avoid repeated `write_file` rewrites of the same expected-output file.
